title: LEO data on graduate and postgraduate outcomes: 2022 to 2023
body: "This release is about graduates from higher education providers in England with a:   first degree (level 6 qualification) level 7 qualification level 8 qualification   It compares earnings by characteristics including:   qualification level ethnicity subject studied region free school meal status   It uses longitudinal education outcomes (LEO) data.  "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
